_comment: REST /api is proxied to the relay so the PWA works same-origin (cookies, CSRF). The realtime socket connects to the relay directly via VITE_RELAY_URL (socket.ts) because Vercel can't proxy the WS upgrade. Update the /api destination to your relay origin when self-hosting. The SPA catch-all MUST stay last.

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ws: wss: https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; worker-src 'self'; manifest-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
